better_than_replicate_flux.name: Stable Diffusion 3.5
better_than_replicate_flux.description: Open-source text-to-image model with MMDiT architecture. Supports SD 3.5 Medium, Large, and Turbo. Better text rendering and prompt adherence than SDXL.
better_than_replicate_flux.performance_notes: Turbo variant optimized for speed, Large variant for quality

better_than_replicate_flux.name: Hugging Face Diffusers
better_than_replicate_flux.description: Library of state-of-the-art pretrained diffusion models. Supports text-to-image, image-to-image, inpainting. Works with multiple model families.

better_than_replicate_flux.name: Automatic1111 WebUI
better_than_replicate_flux.description: User-friendly web interface for Stable Diffusion. Supports text-to-image, image-to-image, inpainting, outpainting, upscaling.

better_than_replicate_flux.name: ComfyUI
better_than_replicate_flux.description: Node-based visual workflow system for AI image generation. Every component is exposed as connectable nodes for maximum control.

better_than_replicate_flux.name: LocalAI
better_than_replicate_flux.description: Free, open-source OpenAI alternative for running LLMs, image generation locally. Drop-in replacement REST API.

no_current_solution_alternatives.name: Wan 2.2 (Alibaba)
no_current_solution_alternatives.description: Most cinematic open-source video generation model. Uses Mixture-of-Experts diffusion backbone for efficient scaling.
no_current_solution_alternatives.quality: Highest cinematic quality in open-source options

no_current_solution_alternatives.name: LTXVideo (Lightricks)
no_current_solution_alternatives.description: Fast, optimized video generation model. Trade-off between speed and quality.

no_current_solution_alternatives.name: Open-Sora 2.0
no_current_solution_alternatives.description: Large open-source video generation model with strong community adoption and tooling support.

no_current_solution_alternatives.name: AnimateDiff
no_current_solution_alternatives.description: Plug-and-play module turning text-to-image models into video generators. Brings motion to still images.

no_current_solution_alternatives.name: EbSynth
no_current_solution_alternatives.description: Example-based image synthesis and style transfer. Non-neural approach using texture synthesis algorithms.
no_current_solution_alternatives.free_tier_details: Public domain license - do anything with it
no_current_solution_alternatives.approach: Non-AI based - uses example-based synthesis, not neural networks

api_alternatives.name: Google Veo 3.1
api_alternatives.description: Proprietary video generation model via Google API

api_alternatives.name: Sora 2
api_alternatives.description: Generates video and audio together with physics simulation

image_editing_processing.name: OpenCV
image_editing_processing.description: Computer vision library for image/video processing, object detection, face recognition.
image_editing_processing.installation: pip install opencv-python opencv-contrib-python numpy matplotlib

image_editing_processing.name: Pillow (PIL)
image_editing_processing.description: Python Imaging Library - friendly image processing for Python. Extensive file format support.

image_editing_processing.name: RemBG
image_editing_processing.description: AI-powered background removal using U^2-Net. CLI, library, HTTP server, and Docker container options.

image_editing_processing.name: GFPGAN
image_editing_processing.description: Real-world face restoration algorithm. Restores old, blurry, compressed, or damaged photos using Generative Facial Prior.

multi_agent_frameworks.name: LangChain
multi_agent_frameworks.description: Agent engineering platform for building LLM-powered applications. Chains components and third-party integrations.

subcomponents.name: LangGraph
subcomponents.description: Low-level orchestration for long-running, stateful agents

subcomponents.name: Deep Agents
subcomponents.description: Agent harness with planning tool, filesystem backend, and subagent spawning

multi_agent_frameworks.name: AutoGen
multi_agent_frameworks.description: Multi-agent conversation framework. Enables LLM agents to converse for task accomplishment.
multi_agent_frameworks.status: Maintenance mode - no new features. Microsoft recommends Agent Framework for new projects.

multi_agent_frameworks.name: CrewAI
multi_agent_frameworks.description: Framework for orchestrating role-playing autonomous AI agents. Agents collaborate via context sharing and delegation.

multi_agent_frameworks.name: Pydantic AI
multi_agent_frameworks.description: Type-safe Python framework for building LLM agents with validated structured outputs. Uses Pydantic models for validation.
multi_agent_frameworks.observability: Pydantic Logfire integration for tracing and monitoring

multi_agent_frameworks.name: LlamaIndex
multi_agent_frameworks.description: Multi-agent framework with RAG capabilities. Rebranded from RAG framework to multi-agent orchestration.

multi_agent_patterns.name: AgentWorkflow
multi_agent_patterns.description: Built-in pattern with managed hand-offs between agents

multi_agent_patterns.name: Orchestrator Pattern
multi_agent_patterns.description: Orchestrator agent chooses which sub-agent to call

multi_agent_patterns.name: Custom Planner
multi_agent_patterns.description: DIY approach with custom LLM prompts

self_hosted_api_options.name: Ollama
self_hosted_api_options.description: Run LLMs locally and offline. Supports various models (Llama, Mistral, etc.).

self_hosted_api_options.name: vLLM
self_hosted_api_options.description: High-throughput, memory-efficient LLM inference and serving engine. OpenAI-compatible API.
self_hosted_api_options.performance: Up to 90% GPU memory utilization by default

self_hosted_api_options.name: Text Generation Inference (TGI)
self_hosted_api_options.description: Toolkit for deploying and serving LLMs at scale. Used in production by Hugging Face.
self_hosted_api_options.status: Maintenance mode as of Dec 2025. Hugging Face recommends vLLM or SGLang for new projects.

self_hosted_api_options.name: Ray Serve
self_hosted_api_options.description: Scalable model serving library. Distributed inference across multiple nodes with load balancing.

recommendations.image_generation_quick_start: Start with Hugging Face Diffusers (lowest complexity) or Automatic1111 WebUI (best UI/UX)
recommendations.image_generation_advanced: Use ComfyUI for maximum control with node-based workflows
recommendations.video_generation_best_quality: Wan 2.2 for cinematic quality, AnimateDiff for image-to-video
recommendations.image_editing_advanced: OpenCV for complex computer vision tasks
recommendations.image_enhancement: GFPGAN for face restoration, RemBG for background removal
recommendations.multi_agent_easiest: CrewAI or Pydantic AI for straightforward multi-agent setups
recommendations.multi_agent_production: LangChain with LangGraph or LlamaIndex for enterprise applications
recommendations.self_hosted_llm_simple: Ollama with Docker for minimal setup
recommendations.self_hosted_llm_scale: Ray Serve for distributed, multi-model deployments
